texto: [E]ach of our voices has something unique to say. Not only should I not mold my life to the demands of external conformity
autor: I can't even find the model by which to live outside myself. I can only find it within.
explicacao: Orientação direta de I can't even find the model by which to live outside myself. I can only find it within. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “[E]ach of our voices has something unique to say. Not only should I not mold my life to the deman…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, charles-taylor, multiculturalism, útil em momentos de multiculturalism.
